message.content:
I need to update the architecture documentation file to reflect the split of ai-coaching.tsx into multiple files.

1. First, find and read the file `docs/ARCHITECTURE_CURRENT.md` in `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-67380/hireloop/`

2. Then update any section that mentions `ai-coaching.tsx` to reflect the new file structure:
   - `ai-coaching.tsx` — Thin router/shell component (291 lines) — manages shared state (stats, questions, progress, history, mock sessions), data loading, and renders header/stats/tab structure. Delegates tab content to sub-components.
   - `quick-practice.tsx` — Quick Practice tab (~1442 lines) — practice modal, camera/recording, video+text response submission, AI coaching results display
   - `mock-interview.tsx` — Mock Interview tab (~1665 lines) — voice interview with TTS, camera, frame capture, speech recognition, silence detection, real-time body language analysis
   - `ai-coaching-progress.tsx` — Progress + History tabs (~370 lines) — category progress bars, recent sessions, history with filter/review dialog
   - `coaching-types.ts` — Shared TypeScript types (185 lines) — already existed
   - `coaching-utils.tsx` — Shared utility components (68 lines) — already existed

3. Write the updated file. Keep all other sections unchanged — only modify the ai-coaching related content.

IMPORTANT: Only EDIT the existing file. Do NOT create new files. Use the Edit tool to make surgical changes. If there's a section listing files in the candidate directory or pages, update it to reflect the new split files.

content.text: I'll start by reading the architecture documentation file to understand its current content.

content.content:
1→# HireLoop — Current Architecture
     2→
     3→**Last Audited:** Feb 14, 2026
     4→
     5→## Overview
     6→
     7→HireLoop is an AI-native hiring platform with dual frontend (React SPA + legacy HTML), Express.js backend, and Neon PostgreSQL. 351 API endpoints, 105 tables, 50 migrations. Deployed on Render.
     8→
     9→**Live URL:** https://hireloop-vzvw.polsia.app
    10→
    11→---
    12→
    13→## Frontend (client/src/)
    14→
    15→### React Pages (36 page files, 42 routes)
    16→
    17→#### Candidate (15 page files, 15 routes)
    18→| Route | File | API Endpoints Used |
    19→|-------|------|--------------------|
    20→| `/candidate` | `pages/candidate/dashboard.tsx` | `/api/candidate/profile`, `/api/jobs` |
    21→| `/candidate/profile` | `pages/candidate/profile.tsx` | `/api/candidate/profile`, `/api/candidate/skills` |
    22→| `/candidate/jobs` | `pages/candidate/jobs.tsx` | `/api/jobs`, `/api/matching/recommendations` |
    23→| `/candidate/jobs/:id` | `pages/candidate/job-detail.tsx` | `/api/jobs/:id`, `/api/candidate/applications` |
    24→| `/candidate/assessments` | `pages/candidate/assessments.tsx` | `/api/assessments` |
    25→| `/candidate/assessments/:id/take` | `pages/candidate/assessment-take.tsx` | `/api/assessments/:id` |
    26→| `/candidate/job-assessment/:id` | `pages/candidate/job-assessment-take.tsx` | `/api/assessments/:id` |
    27→| `/candidate/interviews` | `pages/candidate/interviews.tsx` | `/api/interviews` |
    28→| `/candidate/ai-coaching` | `pages/candidate/ai-coaching.tsx` | `/api/interviews/practice/*`, `/api/interviews/mock/*` |
    29→| `/candidate/applications` | `pages/candidate/applications.tsx` | `/api/candidate/applications` |
    30→| `/candidate/offers` | `pages/candidate/offers.tsx` | `/api/candidate/offers` |
    31→| `/candidate/omniscore` | `pages/candidate/omniscore.tsx` | `/api/omniscore` |
    32→| `/candidate/documents` | `pages/placeholder.tsx` | (placeholder) |
    33→| `/candidate/onboarding` | `pages/candidate/onboarding.tsx` | `/api/onboarding` |
    34→| `/candidate/payroll` | `pages/candidate/payroll.tsx` | `/api/payroll` |
    35→
    36→**Support files (not routed pages):**
    37→- `pages/candidate/coaching-types.ts` — TypeScript types extracted from ai-coaching.tsx
    38→- `pages/candidate/coaching-utils.tsx` — Utility functions extracted from ai-coaching.tsx
    39→- `pages/candidate/screening.tsx` — Routed at `/screening/:token` (top-level, not under /candidate)
    40→
    41→#### Recruiter (13 page files, 17 routes)
    42→| Route | File | API Endpoints Used |
    43→|-------|------|--------------------|
    44→| `/recruiter` | `pages/recruiter/dashboard.tsx` | `/api/recruiter/dashboard` |
    45→| `/recruiter/jobs` | `pages/recruiter/jobs.tsx` | `/api/jobs` |
    46→| `/recruiter/jobs/new` | `pages/recruiter/job-form.tsx` | `/api/jobs`, `/api/recruiter/job-optimizer` |
    47→| `/recruiter/jobs/:id/applicants` | `pages/recruiter/job-applicants.tsx` | `/api/recruiter/jobs/:id/applicants` |
    48→| `/recruiter/jobs/:id/edit` | `pages/recruiter/job-form.tsx` | `/api/jobs/:id` (reuses job-form) |
    49→| `/recruiter/jobs/:id` | `pages/recruiter/job-applicants.tsx` | `/api/recruiter/jobs/:id/applicants` (reuses job-applicants) |
    50→| `/recruiter/jobs/:id/assessment` | `pages/recruiter/job-assessment.tsx` | `/api/assessments` |
    51→| `/recruiter/applications` | `pages/recruiter/applications.tsx` | `/api/recruiter/applications` |
    52→| `/recruiter/assessments` | `pages/recruiter/assessments.tsx` | `/api/assessments` |
    53→| `/recruiter/candidates` | `pages/placeholder.tsx` | (placeholder) |
    54→| `/recruiter/interviews` | `pages/recruiter/interviews.tsx` | `/api/interviews` |
    55→| `/recruiter/offers` | `pages/recruiter/offers.tsx` | `/api/recruiter/offers` |
    56→| `/recruiter/onboarding` | `pages/recruiter/onboarding.tsx` | `/api/onboarding` |
    57→| `/recruiter/analytics` | `pages/placeholder.tsx` | (placeholder) |
    58→| `/recruiter/company` | `pages/recruiter/company.tsx` | `/api/company` |
    59→| `/recruiter/payroll` | `pages/recruiter/payroll.tsx` | `/api/payroll` |
    60→| `/recruiter/omniscore` | `pages/recruiter/omniscore.tsx` | `/api/omniscore` |
    61→
    62→#### Admin (2 pages)
    63→| Route | File |
    64→|-------|------|
    65→| `/admin/login` | `pages/admin/login.tsx` |
    66→| `/admin/ai-health` | `pages/admin/ai-health.tsx` |
    67→
    68→#### Auth, Utility & Debug Routes
    69→| Route | File | Notes |
    70→|-------|------|-------|
    71→| `/` | `pages/landing.tsx` | Landing page |
    72→| `/login` | `pages/login.tsx` | Auth |
    73→| `/register` | `pages/register.tsx` | Auth |
    74→| `/dashboard` | (RoleRedirect) | Redirects to /candidate or /recruiter based on role |
    75→| `/test-camera` | `pages/test-camera.tsx` | Camera testing utility |
    76→| `/screening/:token` | `pages/candidate/screening.tsx` | Candidate screening (top-level route) |
    77→| `/debug/mock-interview` | `pages/debug/mock-interview.tsx` | Mock interview debug tool |
    78→| `/settings` | `DashboardLayout` | Settings section |
    79→| `*` | Catch-all → Navigate to `/` | 404 redirect |
    80→
    81→### Shared Components
    82→- **UI (components/ui/):** avatar, badge, button, card, dialog, input, label, select, tabs, textarea
    83→- **Layout (components/layout/):** dashboard-layout, header, sidebar
    84→- **Feature:** admin-auth-guard, ai-onboarding-dashboard, ai-onboarding-recruiter, error-boundary
    85→- **Context (contexts/):** auth-context.tsx (authentication state)
    86→- **Lib (lib/):** api.ts (Axios client), utils.ts
    87→
    88→### Legacy Frontend (public/)
    89→42 HTML pages still served. Major ones: recruiter-*.html, candidate-*.html, assessment-*.html. Gradually being replaced by React SPA.
    90→
    91→---
    92→
    93→## Backend (server.js + routes/ + services/ + lib/)
    94→
    95→### API Routes (19 files, 351 endpoints)
    96→
    97→| Route File | Lines | Count | Domain |
    98→|-----------|-------|-------|--------|
    99→| `routes/interviews.js` | 3190 | 44 | Interview scheduling, AI coaching, mock interviews, video analysis |
   100→| `routes/onboarding.js` | 3119 | 43 | Document generation, I-9, W-4, policies, benefits |
   101→| `routes/candidate.js` | 2230 | 46 | Candidate profile, resume, skills, experience, education |
   102→| `routes/assessments.js` | 1898 | 22 | Skill assessments, grading, AI feedback |
   103→| `routes/recruiter.js` | 1850 | 43 | Dashboard, analytics, job optimization, candidate fit |
   104→| `routes/payroll.js` | 941 | 16 | Payroll runs, paychecks, tax calculations |
   105→| `routes/communications.js` | 633 | 13 | Message templates, bulk messaging |
   106→| `routes/memory.js` | 598 | 14 | Smart profile memory, autofill |
   107→| `routes/omniscore.js` | 578 | 13 | Candidate/company scoring |
   108→| `routes/compliance.js` | 553 | 16 | Bias detection, consent, audit, fairness |
   109→| `routes/auth.js` | 540 | 13 | Registration, login, OAuth, refresh tokens |
   110→| `routes/documents.js` | 422 | 8 | Upload, OCR, fraud detection |
   111→| `routes/company.js` | 418 | 7 | Company profile, settings |
   112→| `routes/jobs.js` | 238 | 6 | Job CRUD |
   113→| `routes/matching.js` | 206 | 6 | Job/candidate matching, ranking |
   114→| `routes/trustscore.js` | 204 | 6 | Company trust scoring |
   115→| `routes/admin.js` | 160 | 3 | Admin auth |
   116→| `routes/analytics.js` | 124 | 2 | Event logging |
   117→| `routes/countries.js` | 109 | 4 | Country config, tax/labor laws |
   118→| `server.js` | 988 | 26 | Health, AI health dashboard (14), admin metrics |
   119→
   120→### Services (14 files)
   121→
   122→| Service | Lines | Purpose |
   123→|---------|-------|---------|
   124→| `services/matching-engine.js` | 662 | Semantic job/candidate matching |
   125→| `services/document-verification.js` | 524 | OCR, fraud detection, authenticity |
   126→| `services/interview-ai.js` | 485 | Question gen, response analysis, coaching |
   127→| `services/communication-generator.js` | 446 | Email/message templates |
   128→| `services/job-optimizer.js` | 397 | JD optimization, salary insights |
   129→| `services/trustscore.js` | 352 | Company trust scoring |
   130→| `services/omniscore.js` | 343 | Multi-factor candidate scoring |
   131→| `services/payroll-calculator.js` | 307 | Tax calculations, deductions |
   132→| `services/country-config.js` | 280 | Tax config per country |
   133→| `services/scoreExplainer.js` | 273 | Score transparency reports |
   134→| `services/autofill-service.js` | 239 | Smart data reuse |
   135→| `services/biasDetection.js` | 217 | Fairness scoring |
   136→| `services/memory-service.js` | 214 | Profile caching |
   137→| `services/auditLogger.js` | 124 | Audit trail logging |
   138→
   139→### Core Libraries (lib/)
   140→
   141→| Library | Lines | Purpose |
   142→|---------|-------|---------|
   143→| `lib/ai-provider.js` | 2287 | Multi-provider LLM with circuit breaker, fallback chains |
   144→| `lib/polsia-ai.js` | 1304 | AI function wrappers (chat, vision, TTS, ASR, analysis) |
   145→| `lib/ai-call-logger.js` | 545 | AI call logging, usage summary |
   146→| `lib/activity-logger.js` | 399 | Request tracking for admin feed |
   147→| `lib/metrics-collector.js` | 361 | Request/latency/error tracking |
   148→| `lib/token-budget.js` | 331 | Token tracking, budget enforcement |
   149→| `lib/self-hosted-audio.js` | 270 | Piper TTS self-hosted audio pipeline |
   150→| `lib/auth.js` | 192 | JWT handling, authorization middleware |
   151→| `lib/db.js` | 48 | PostgreSQL pool (Neon) |
   152→
   153→### AI Provider Architecture
   154→- **Primary:** Polsia OpenAI proxy (routes to Anthropic Claude, GPT-4o, Google Gemini)
   155→- **Fallback chain:** OpenAI → NIM models (Llama, Nemotron, GPT-OSS) → Groq → Cerebras
   156→- **Vision chain:** OpenAI GPT-4o → NIM Cosmos Reason → NIM Nemotron Nano VL
   157→- **TTS:** Piper (self-hosted via `self-hosted-audio.js`) → browser fallback
   158→- **ASR:** Whisper → Web Speech API
   159→- **Circuit breaker:** Auto-opens on 3 consecutive failures, half-open after 60s
   160→- **Token budget:** Daily limits with priority throttling
   161→
   162→---
   163→
   164→## Database (105 tables, 50 migrations)
   165→
   166→### Schema Health Summary
   167→
   168→| Metric | Count |
   169→|--------|-------|
   170→| Tables | 105 |
   171→| Columns | 1,358 |
   172→| Foreign Keys | 164 |
   173→| Indexes | 386 (105 PKs + 242 custom + 39 other) |
   174→| Partial Indexes | 10 (status-filtered queries) |
   175→| CHECK Constraints | 56 (42 custom `chk_*` + 14 system) |
   176→| Unique Constraints | 36 |
   177→| TEXT columns | 373 |
   178→| VARCHAR columns | 25 (genuinely bounded: country_code, currency_code, phone, zip, etc.) |
   179→| timestamptz columns | 227 |
   180→| timestamp w/o tz | 2 (only `_migrations.applied_at` + `user_sessions.expire` — system tables) |
   181→
   182→**Schema pattern:** Normalized Relational (3NF) with JSONB extensions
   183→**Vector indexes:** 2 IVFFlat (candidate_embeddings, job_embeddings)
   184→**Schema hardening:** P0–P3 complete ✅ (Feb 14, 2026)
   185→
   186→### Schema Hardening History (P0–P3) ✅ ALL COMPLETE
   187→
   188→| Phase | Migration | Changes |
   189→|-------|-----------|---------|
   190→| **P0** | `041_fix_company_fk.js` | 5 company_id FK corrections (users.id → companies.id) |
   191→| **P1** | `042_p1_interview_flow_schema.js` | 20 timestamp→timestamptz, NOT NULL constraints, 4 FKs, 14 indexes, 5 updated_at columns |
   192→| **P2** | `045_p2_schema_hardening.js` | 37 CHECK constraints, 274 varchar→TEXT, 5 timestamp→timestamptz |
   193→| **P3** | `046_p3_schema_optimizations.js` | 64 FK indexes, 182 timestamptz conversions, 6 partial indexes, 7 unique constraints |
   194→
   195→### Domain Groups (16 groups, 105 tables)

   366→---
   367→
   368→## Infrastructure
   369→
   370→- **Hosting:** Render (web service)
   371→- **Database:** Neon PostgreSQL
   372→- **Storage:** Polsia R2 (file uploads)
   373→- **Build:** Vite (frontend) → Express serves static from `client/dist/`
   374→- **Sessions:** PostgreSQL session store (connect-pg-simple), 7-day expiry
   375→- **Body limit:** 50MB JSON for video frame uploads
   376→- **CORS:** Credentials enabled
   377→- **Permissions:** Camera + microphone access headers
   378→
   379→---
   380→
   381→## Problem Areas
   382→
   383→### 1. Monolith Files
   384→- **`ai-coaching.tsx` (4044 lines):** Quick Practice AND Mock Interview crammed together. Types + utilities extracted to `coaching-types.ts` (184 lines) and `coaching-utils.tsx` (67 lines) on Feb 14. Full component split pending.
   385→- **`ai-provider.js` (2287 lines):** Provider abstraction + 15+ provider implementations + circuit breaker logic. Largest backend file.
   386→- **`interviews.js` (3190 lines):** Interview scheduling, AI coaching, mock interviews, video analysis — 44 endpoints in a single route file.
   387→- **`onboarding.js` (3119 lines):** Document generation, I-9, W-4, policies, benefits — 43 endpoints.
   388→- **`polsia-ai.js` (1304 lines):** AI function wrappers growing with each new feature.
